title: sovereign bonds / euro area / absorption capacity | Financial Stability Report | Sovereign bond markets and financial stability: examining th...
summary: This ECB Financial Stability Review box examines how different financial sectors (banks, investment funds, pension funds, insurance corporations, households, and foreign investors) absorb euro area sovereign bond issuance. The analysis finds that sovereign debt absorption has proceeded smoothly in 2023 despite the end of Eurosystem net purchases in June 2022, with higher yields attracting investors back to sovereign debt. The research identifies key regulatory and structural factors affecting absorption capacity, including bank accounting treatments, Tier 1 capital ratios, and liquidity coverage requirements.
